# Dostarlimab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Dostarlimab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Dostarlimab</strong> 目前有 <strong>30 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Dostarlimab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Jemperli is indicated in combination with carboplatin and paclitaxel for the first-line treatment of adult patients with primary advanced or recurrent endometrial cancer (EC) and who are candidates...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>rod-cone dystrophy, sensorineural deafness, and Fanconi-type renal dysfunction（50.0%）</li>
<li>immune epilepsy（50.0%）</li>
<li>myoclonic encephalopathy in non-progressive disorder（50.0%）</li>
<li>self-limited familial and non-familial neonatal/infantile seizures（50.0%）</li>
<li>photosensitive occipital lobe epilepsy（50.0%）</li>
<li>adult-onset segmental dystonia（50.0%）</li>
<li>autoimmune retinopathy（50.0%）</li>
<li>paratenonitis with tendinosis（50.0%）</li>
<li>idiopathic anaphylaxis（50.0%）</li>
<li>acetazolamide-responsive hereditary episodic ataxia（50.0%）</li>
<li>saccharopinuria（50.0%）</li>
<li>EEC syndrome（50.0%）</li>
<li>complex neurodevelopmental disorder（50.0%）</li>
<li>structural epilepsy（50.0%）</li>
<li>metabolic epilepsy（50.0%）</li>
<li>TH-deficient infantile parkinsonism and motor delay（50.0%）</li>
<li>PRPS1 deficiency disorder（50.0%）</li>
<li>food-dependent exercise-induced anaphylaxis（50.0%）</li>
<li>paratenonitis（50.0%）</li>
<li>adolescent/adult-onset epilepsy syndrome（50.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/dostarlimab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
